overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a horse-drawn carriage traveling through a desert landscape during golden hour. The camera follows behind the carriage as it navigates dirt trails past red rock formations and makes a turn at a wooden signpost intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert wilderness trail with large red rock formation

agents.ego_description: traveling in a horse-drawn carriage along a winding dirt path through arid terrain with red rock formations

entered.detail: tall reddish-brown rock outcropping dominating the right side of the trail
sandy dirt path winding through desert vegetation
scattered low-lying desert vegetation and sagebrush
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a horse-drawn carriage traveling along a dirt trail through a desert landscape during golden hour. A large red rock formation dominates the right side of the frame while sparse desert vegetation lines both sides of the path. The camera follows smoothly behind the carriage as it moves steadily forward through the open wilderness.

events.description: carriage approaches wooden signpost and begins turning left at the trail intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating the horse-drawn carriage through a left turn at the trail intersection marked by a wooden signpost

entered.detail: weathered wooden trail marker with directional signs at the intersection
dirt trail crossing with multiple path directions

segments.scene_description: The carriage approaches a wooden signpost marking a trail intersection. As it reaches the junction, the carriage makes a distinct left turn, causing the large red rock formation to exit the frame to the right. The camera follows the turn smoothly, revealing open prairie land in the new direction of travel.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert prairie with distant rock formations

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt trail through open prairie landscape toward distant rock formations

entered.detail: scattered rock outcroppings visible on the horizon ahead
isolated trees dotting the prairie landscape
expansive flat grassland stretching to the horizon

segments.scene_description: After completing the turn, the carriage continues along the new trail direction through open prairie land. The landscape opens up to reveal distant rock formations on the horizon and scattered trees. The wooden signpost falls behind as the carriage moves steadily forward through the expansive wilderness terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement behind a horse-drawn carriage as it travels from a rugged red rock canyon into an expansive open prairie. It begins on a dirt trail during the golden hour, moving steadily forward with a massive red rock formation dominating the right side of the frame. As the carriage reaches a wooden signpost at a trail intersection, it makes a distinct left turn, causing the red rocks to slide out of view. The scene then opens up into a wide prairie landscape, shifting the perspective toward a distant horizon of scattered trees and far-off rock formations. Finally, the camera continues its smooth pursuit as the signpost recedes into the distance and the carriage ventures deeper into the expansive wilderness.
